summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for saved AI conversation history, session metadata persistence, astrologer history loading, chart education overlays, ask-astrologer shortcuts, mobile quick-ask reachability, and chart-to-chat context propagation. All requested flows passed.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for this scope.
Optional: run one real-device mobile pass to complement automation confidence.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issues found in reviewed backend/frontend files for this feature scope.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded blueprint account from /app/tests/seed_ai_users.json. Added transient pytest-created test user for backend endpoint validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New backend regression file verifies /api/ai-astrologer/sessions emptiness-before-message, message-driven session metadata (title/preview/message_count), and loading persisted sessions by session_id. Frontend automation validated desktop hover education overlay (quick meaning + mini learning note + ask shortcut), desktop history list/session reload, and mobile quick-ask top button navigation with preserved focus context + draft.
rca of the issue: No product bug reproduced in this run. One transient Playwright browser crash (SIGSEGV at launch) occurred once and passed on immediate retry; this appears infra/runtime-related rather than app logic related.
